rulings.Case Title: BARBARA FEDUN VS. RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION

rulings.Case Title: STEVE RYAN VS. MITCHELL ROSENFELD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Personal Representative For Deceased Defendant Allen J. Chung And Granting Leave To File Supplemental Complaint; And Supporting Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 24, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF STEVE RYAN's Motion For Order Substituting Personal Representative For Deceased Defendant Allen J. Chung And Granting Leave To File Supplemental Complaint GRANTED, the application was timely made. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH COURT, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. AMANDA SMOCK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 24, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH COURT, L.P.'s Re-Noticed MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required to address: (1) what is actually terminated by the Ellis Act Notice of Termination of Tenancy in light of CCP 1933 and Regulation 12.19; is Ellis Act not applicable and why; (2) the meaning of "accommodations for at least one year prior to the date of delivery to the public entity of the notice of intent to withdraw"; and (3) the propriety of payment of relocation fees to the tenants via attorney. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SONG KOCHAPHUM VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 24, 2017 line 4. Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the authority of foreclosing entity may be challenged pre-foreclosure. Yvanova stands for the proposition that such standing exists after foreclosure. Yvanova v. New Century Mortg. Corp. (2016) 62 Cal.4th 919. = (501/REQ)
